name: NICE CXone Contact Center API
what_it_does: NICE CXone REST API for enterprise cloud contact center platform. Enables AI agents to query interactions, retrieve analytics, manage workforce scheduling, access quality management data, and integrate omnichannel CX capabilities. NICE CXone is one of the largest CCaaS platforms serving enterprise contact centers.
use_cases: Querying contact center interaction history and recordings from CX analytics agents
Retrieving agent performance metrics and adherence data from WFM agents
Accessing quality management scores and evaluations from QA automation agents
Integrating omnichannel analytics into CX reporting and BI pipeline agents
not_for: Small teams without enterprise contact center needs
best_when: A large enterprise running NICE CXone wants AI agents to analyze contact center performance, automate WFM data flows, and surface CX insights into operational reporting.
avoid_when: You don't have NICE CXone — enterprise CCaaS with significant cost. PRIVACY: Customer interaction recordings and transcripts are highly sensitive.

auth.notes: NICE CXone OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. Application registration in NICE CXone Central. Roles control API access scope.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per seat/agent pricing; multiple product tiers
pricing.notes: Enterprise CCaaS platform. API access included with NICE CXone subscription. Significant investment.

performance.rate_limits: NICE CXone API rate limits per application and endpoint

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer call recordings, chats, and interaction data are highly sensitive
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
NICE CXone has multiple API generations — verify you're using current REST API
Regional cloud deployments — API endpoints vary by tenant region
WFM and QM APIs are separate product modules — may require additional licensing
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer interaction recordings, transcripts, and PII across all channels. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with roles.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise CCaaS with customer interaction PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. Global data residency.
